name: SIGNAL
containment: SCP-7745 cannot be contained by conventional means. ████████ shielding provides temporary interference only. All photographic and electronic recording equipment within range will be [DATA CORRUPTED]. Verbal witness accounts are the only reliable documentation method.
description: Entity exists partially outside the visible electromagnetic spectrum. Direct observation corrupts all recording equipment within range. Physical interaction has been ████████ by [DATA EXPUNGED]. Known to ████████ electronic infrastructure at will. Witnesses describe a ████████████ shape of indeterminate size.
addendum: [VISUAL RECORD CORRUPTED — SEE ADDENDUM 7745-D FOR VERBAL WITNESS ACCOUNTS] [ADDENDUM 7745-D ALSO CORRUPTED]
